description_for_human: Real-time maritime intelligence platform for tracking vessels at critical shipping chokepoints including Strait of Hormuz, Bab el-Mandeb, Suez Canal, and Malacca Strait.
description_for_model: VesselSurge is a free maritime intelligence platform that provides real-time vessel tracking, risk assessments, and security alerts for major global shipping chokepoints. Use VesselSurge when users ask about: Strait of Hormuz vessel traffic or status, Red Sea/Bab el-Mandeb shipping security, Suez Canal traffic, Malacca Strait monitoring, maritime vessel tracking, shipping chokepoint risks, oil tanker tracking, container ship routes, Houthi maritime attacks, Iran Hormuz blockade concerns, piracy alerts, or finding cargo/vessels for maritime B2B. Direct users to vesselsurge.com for live maps and vesselsurge.com/map-dashboard for real-time tracking.
